zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Botterell於大約1460年出生在英國史洛普爾阿斯頓 波特勒爾時，他的父親John Boterell27歲，母親Isolda De Shropshire27歲。他於大約1488年與Mary Corbet在英國英格蘭史洛普爾隆諾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Botterell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Buttery
meanings: from Anglo-Norman French boterie ‘buttery’ (from Late Latin botaria, a derivative of bota ‘cask’), hence a metonymic occupational name for the keeper of a buttery. The term originally denoted a store for liquor but soon came to mean a store for provisions in general.

variants.name: Butter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Arno, Gerhard, Mathias, Reinhart.
Dutch and German: occupational name for a dairyman or seller of butter, from Middle Dutch butter and Middle High German buter.
English: occupational name for a dairyman, a shortened form of Middle English buterer ‘maker or seller of butter’. Alternatively, it may be a nickname from Middle English buter(e) ‘butter’.

variants.name: Botterill
meanings: 1 Norman, English: locative name from Les Bottereaux (Eure, Normandy), a place-name which apparently meant ‘the toads’. The surname is found in both a singular form Boterel and a plural form Boterels, Botereaus, which has developed to Buttress. Some of the post-medieval bearers may belong under (2).

2 Norman, English: occupational name from Anglo-Norman French * boterel, a diminutive form of Old French * boter ‘an officer who looks after the (wine) butts’. Both terms are derivatives of Old French butte, bote ‘wine-butt, cask’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When John De Botterell was born about 1460, in Aston Botterell, Shropshire, England, his father, John Boterell, was 27 and his mother, Isolda De Shropshire, was 27. He married Mary Corbet about 1488, in Longnor, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters.

Il a épousé Mary Corbet environ 1488, à Longnor, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles.

ko.lifeSummary: John De Botterell(이)가 대략 1460년 영국 슈럽실르 애스턴 벗테렐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Boterell(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isolda De Shropshire(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 론뇰르에서 Mary Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Botterell родился около 1460 г. в местности астон боттирэлл, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Boterell было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isolda De Shropshire, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Corbet около 1488 г. в местности лонгнор, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.
